The '''''Liquidator''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]].

==Behind the scenes==
It was confirmed by [[Leland Chee]] that the ''Liquidator'' from ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' was the same mentioned in ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''.<ref name="SWBoards">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=1125#16098316|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-12-28|time=4:01 PM}}</ref>

{{Ship-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars Missions 1: Assault on Yavin Four]]'' {{1st}}

*''[[Star Wars Missions 3: Attack on Delrakkin]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 17: Darth Vader's Return]]'' {{Mo}}
